description_long: This is a medium-sized dog with a muscular build and a short, dense coat that is predominantly dark brown with black shading along the back and upper body. The dog has a straight back, a slightly tapered snout, and pricked, upright ears that give it an alert expression. Its legs are strong and straight, with well-defined paws, and the tail is straight and held low. The facial features are sharp, with a pronounced brow and a focused gaze. The overall body proportions suggest agility and strength, typical of working or herding breeds. No collar or leash is visible, and the dog appears healthy and attentive.
description: A medium-sized, muscular dog with a short, dark brown and black coat, pricked ears, and a straight, low-held tail. The dog has an alert, athletic appearance and no visible collar or leash.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dog's pricked ears, sharp facial features, and straight, muscular forelegs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the dog's straight back, strong legs, and the black shading along its upper body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the symmetrical hind legs, straight tail, and the dark coloration along the spine.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the dog's athletic build, pricked ears, and low, straight tail.
attribute_breed: German Shepherd (working line) or similar shepherd-type breed
